description: Draft of a marriage contract (ketubba) under the authority of Avraham Maimonides, who is referred to as "Nagid" (therefore post-1213 CE). There are numerous other jottings in Hebrew script, Arabic script, and Greek/Coptic numerals.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
